title: Garcinia calcicola
intro: Garcinia calcicola, also known as the calcicola garcinia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant is rich in potential health benefits, including weight management and improved lipid profiles due to its high content of hydroxycitric acid (HCA), a compound that inhibits citrate lyase and suppresses appetite. Garcinia calcicola is also a source of bioactive constituents such as flavonoids and alkaloids, which contribute to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, Garcinia calcicola is used to prepare herbal supplements and teas, often combined with other plant extracts to enhance its weight loss and metabolic benefits.
